---
title: "Scalable Enterprise Campus Architecture Design"
date: "2025-01-01"
order: 15
fig-cap-location: bottom
categories: [ccde-written]
---

```{=html}
<style>
figcaption { text-align: center; }
</style>
```


## Overview

*Next: [Enterprise Internet Edge Architecture Design](enterprise-internet-edge-architecture-design.qmd)*
